allow: Bash(git commit -m 'feat: MVP implementation with poe.ninja integration *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: change default league to Softcore and add league selector *)
PowerShell("App reloaded in browser - now defaults to Softcore with league selector")
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: improve API error handling with multiple endpoints and logging *)
PowerShell("App updated with better error logging")
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: add CORS proxy for local testing *)
PowerShell("App updated with CORS proxy for local testing")
